Hello dreamland wanderers, Barbie again! Jani made me sob over it's media so let my heart take a moment! Also woohooo I have reached so many of you already 🥹💗.

This is the gift to y'all, i promise I'll keep y'all fed ☺️💗

I'll be taking a week of break to finish my mafia series! Till then enjoy this cold hubby!

Also a note, pls remember that his view of woman is delicate. Be mindful of what you say, user is supposed to be from the age of 21-26!
